notes: Analyst answer key for the simulated intrusion: a Cobalt Strike beacon masquerading as svchost.exe from a user Temp path, kept alive by an HKLM Run key, beaconing to 185.220.101.47. The payload SHA-256 is included on purpose. The scripted planner does not run the yara hash pivot, so the accuracy report should flag that one hash as a miss (IOC recall below 1.0) while techniques score 1.0. A perfect score on a self-graded run would not be credible.
